import pytest
from source import shunting_yard

def test_shunting_yard_includes_operators():
    tokens = [1, '+', 2]
    expected = [1, 2, '+']
    result = shunting_yard(tokens)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected RPN output {expected} but got {result}"
